meta.importedFrom: Unit 2 Passage 1 Last but not least（互动课文教学动画）英语新教材外研版七年级下册.html

article.title: Last but not least
article.summary: 北京马拉松终点线前的坚持，展现永不放弃的体育精神。

sentences.text: It was the last minute of the 2022 Beijing Marathon.
sentences.tr: 那是2022年北京马拉松的最后一分钟。
sentences.g: 主系表结构 + 时间状语
sentences.d: 这是一个简单的主系表结构句子。'It was'是主系表，'the last minute'是表语，'of the 2022 Beijing Marathon'是介词短语作定语修饰minute。

sentences.text: However, 86-year-old Zhang Shun was still about 100 metres from the finishing line.
sentences.tr: 然而，86岁的张顺仍然距离终点线约100米。
sentences.g: 转折连词 + 主系表 + 距离状语
sentences.d: 'However'表示转折。'86-year-old'是复合形容词作定语。'be...from'表示距离某地有多远。

sentences.text: People watched him move slowly.
sentences.tr: 人们看着他缓慢移动。
sentences.g: 主谓宾补结构
sentences.d: 'watch sb do sth'是感官动词的用法，后接不带to的不定式作宾语补足语，表示看到某人做某事的全过程。

sentences.text: All of them held their breath.
sentences.tr: 他们所有人都屏住了呼吸。
sentences.g: 主谓宾结构
sentences.d: 'hold one's breath'是固定短语，意为屏住呼吸。'All of them'强调所有人。

sentences.text: Would he make it?
sentences.tr: 他能成功吗？
sentences.g: 一般疑问句（过去将来时）
sentences.d: 'make it'是固定短语，意为成功、做到。这里用过去将来时表示从过去某个时间点看将要发生的动作。

sentences.text: Zhang felt confident before the race.
sentences.tr: 张顺在比赛前感到自信。
sentences.g: 主系表 + 时间状语
sentences.d: 'feel'是系动词，后接形容词confident作表语。'before the race'是时间状语。

sentences.text: But he had a stomachache on the way.
sentences.tr: 但他在途中胃痛。
sentences.g: 转折连词 + 主谓宾 + 地点状语
sentences.d: 'have a stomachache'表示胃痛。'on the way'在途中，是地点状语。

sentences.text: This made him fall behind.
sentences.tr: 这使他落后了。
sentences.g: 主谓宾补结构（使役动词）
sentences.d: 'make sb do sth'是使役动词的用法，表示使某人做某事。'fall behind'落后。

sentences.text: "Shall I take a rest or stop?" he thought.
sentences.tr: 他想：我应该休息一下还是停下来？
sentences.g: 直接引语 + 主谓结构
sentences.d: 'Shall I...?'表示征求意见或建议。'take a rest'休息。引号内是他的想法，'he thought'是主句。

sentences.text: Either choice seemed fine for someone at his age.
sentences.tr: 对于他这个年纪的人来说，任何一个选择似乎都可以。
sentences.g: 主系表 + 介词短语
sentences.d: 'either'表示两者中的任何一个。'seem'是系动词，后接形容词fine。'for someone at his age'介词短语作状语。

sentences.text: But Zhang chose neither of them.
sentences.tr: 但张顺两个都没选。
sentences.g: 转折连词 + 主谓宾
sentences.d: 'neither of them'表示两者都不。与前面的'either'形成对比。

sentences.text: He just ran on.
sentences.tr: 他只是继续跑。
sentences.g: 主谓结构
sentences.d: 'run on'继续跑，是短语动词。'just'表示仅仅、只是。

sentences.text: With people cheering, he finally crossed the finishing line!
sentences.tr: 在人们的欢呼声中，他终于冲过了终点线！
sentences.g: with复合结构 + 主谓宾
sentences.d: 'with people cheering'是with复合结构作伴随状语，表示伴随的情况。'cross the finishing line'冲过终点线。

sentences.text: Marathon running is Zhang's lifelong dream.
sentences.tr: 马拉松跑步是张顺一生的梦想。
sentences.g: 主系表结构
sentences.d: 'Marathon running'动名词短语作主语。'lifelong'终身的，是形容词作定语。

sentences.text: "In 1989, I saw Beijing Marathon runners go past my home. I just wanted to become one of them," he said.
sentences.tr: 他说：1989年，我看到北京马拉松选手经过我家。我只想成为他们中的一员。
sentences.g: 直接引语 + 主谓结构
sentences.d: 'see sb do sth'看到某人做某事。'go past'经过。'one of them'他们中的一个。

sentences.text: For years, he trained every morning in the park.
sentences.tr: 多年来，他每天早上在公园训练。
sentences.g: 时间状语 + 主谓 + 时间/地点状语
sentences.d: 'For years'多年来，表示一段时间。'every morning'每天早上，'in the park'在公园，都是状语。

sentences.text: He filled over 30 notebooks with his running records.
sentences.tr: 他用跑步记录填满了30多本笔记本。
sentences.g: 主谓宾 + 介词短语
sentences.d: 'fill...with...'用...填满...，是固定搭配。'over 30'超过30个。

sentences.text: None of his family members worried or tried to stop him.
sentences.tr: 他的家人没有人担心或试图阻止他。
sentences.g: 主语 + 并列谓语
sentences.d: 'None of...'表示...中没有一个。'worried'和'tried to stop'是并列谓语，用or连接。

sentences.text: They knew he enjoyed every moment.
sentences.tr: 他们知道他享受每一刻。
sentences.g: 主谓 + 宾语从句
sentences.d: 'knew'后接省略了that的宾语从句。'enjoy'后接名词或动名词作宾语。

sentences.text: Zhang Shun was the oldest and the slowest runner to finish the 2022 Beijing Marathon.
sentences.tr: 张顺是完成2022年北京马拉松年龄最大、速度最慢的选手。
sentences.g: 主系表 + 不定式作定语
sentences.d: 'the oldest and the slowest'是并列的最高级形容词作表语。'to finish...'不定式短语作后置定语修饰runner。

sentences.text: But it didn't matter to him.
sentences.tr: 但这对他来说并不重要。
sentences.g: 转折连词 + 主谓 + 介词短语
sentences.d: 'matter'作动词，意为重要、要紧。'to him'对他来说，是介词短语作状语。

sentences.text: He loves the sport and has no plans to stop.
sentences.tr: 他热爱这项运动，并且没有停止的计划。
sentences.g: 并列谓语 + 不定式作定语
sentences.d: 'loves'和'has'是并列谓语。'to stop'不定式作后置定语修饰plans。

sentences.text: "If possible, I will keep running."
sentences.tr: 如果可能的话，我会继续跑下去。
sentences.g: 条件状语从句（省略） + 主谓宾
sentences.d: 'If possible'是条件状语从句的省略形式，完整形式是'If it is possible'。'keep doing'继续做某事。

readingQuestions.stem: What was Zhang Shun's situation at the last minute of the marathon?
options: A. He had already finished the race
B. He was still about 100 metres from the finishing line
C. He decided to give up
D. He was running very fast
readingQuestions.answer: B. He was still about 100 metres from the finishing line
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章第一段明确指出'86-year-old Zhang Shun was still about 100 metres from the finishing line'，因此答案是B。

readingQuestions.stem: Why did Zhang Shun fall behind during the race?
options: A. He was too old
B. He had a stomachache
C. He wanted to rest
D. The weather was bad
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章第二段提到'But he had a stomachache on the way. This made him fall behind.'，所以答案是B。

readingQuestions.stem: What inspired Zhang Shun to run marathons?
options: A. His family encouraged him
B. He wanted to win a prize
C. He saw Beijing Marathon runners go past his home in 1989
D. His doctor recommended it
readingQuestions.answer: C. He saw Beijing Marathon runners go past his home in 1989
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章第三段Zhang Shun说'In 1989, I saw Beijing Marathon runners go past my home. I just wanted to become one of them'，因此答案是C。

readingQuestions.stem: How did Zhang Shun's family feel about his marathon running?
options: A. They were very worried
B. They tried to stop him
C. They didn't care
D. They knew he enjoyed it and didn't worry
readingQuestions.answer: D. They knew he enjoyed it and didn't worry
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章第三段最后说'None of his family members worried or tried to stop him. They knew he enjoyed every moment.'，所以答案是D。

readingQuestions.stem: What can we learn from Zhang Shun's story?
options: A. Age is just a number when you have a dream
B. Marathon running is easy for everyone
C. You should always be the fastest
D. It's better to stop when you feel tired
readingQuestions.answer: A. Age is just a number when you have a dream
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 张顺86岁仍然坚持完成马拉松，即使遇到困难也不放弃，这个故事告诉我们：当你有梦想时，年龄只是一个数字。因此答案是A。
